skipped.reason: has human review activity (178 new PRs total)

style_guide: Commit subject format: `<area>: <SubArea>: Description` — description starts with capital letter (e.g. `frontend: NodeDetails: Fix drain status polling leak`)
Keep commit subject under 72 characters (soft limit)
Do NOT include `Fixes #NN`, `closes #NN`, or similar auto-close keywords in commit messages
Approval style is warm and brief: 🎉 thanks! is the standard merge acknowledgment from maintainers
copilot-pull-request-reviewer[bot] auto-reviews all PRs; its presence does not indicate human review
PRs must fix a real bug, add a feature, or address a clear maintenance need — pure stylistic refactors without justification are not accepted
Frontend (TypeScript/React): fix exhaustive-deps lint violations rather than suppressing; Material-UI v5 patterns used
Backend (Go): use comma-ok type assertions to avoid panics; structured logging via slog; test-first style
Tests required for both frontend (Vitest) and backend (Go test) when changing logic
Conventional Commits style (feat:, fix:) is NOT used — project uses area: SubArea: Description format
